about.title: CORNERSTONE Open Platform
about.subtitle: OPENSOURCE PDK live monitor
about.notes:
Welcome to the CORNERSTONE PDK Monitor — a free, open-source dashboard for managing and sharing integrated photonics Process Design Kits (PDKs). It acts as a gateway between designers and fabs, giving the community a single place to discover, use, and contribute to open PDKs.
First designed and released by Emre Kaplan, University of Southampton (beta: 01/05/2026). Maintained by the CORNERSTONE PDK team.
Open to everyone — let’s build the open integrated photonics community together!

_distributedSecurity.note: Bundled credentials so user-admins can sign in after adopting this dashboard. The full Admin password is not shared and stays local on each machine.
